The Larz Anderson Auto Museum in the 64-acre Larz Anderson Park showcases "America’s Oldest Car Collection" in the historic Carriage House. The museum offers engaging attractions, including Lawn Events, family-friendly gatherings, and car history lectures. A visit promises a day of exploration and enjoyment, creating lasting memories.
This pass must be reserved through the library's online catalog. The pass must be picked up and returned to the library's Brookline Village location. 
Pass benefits: Free admission for up to 4 visitors. 
No passes are available at this time.
